name: ERPSMART Builder Publish Readiness Report Contract
purpose: Define the read-only publish readiness report returned before any actual publish implementation exists.

report_fields.safe: boolean indicating whether blockers are absent
report_fields.definition: id, name, status, module, table, route
report_fields.database_plan: planned tables/migration requirement only, no migration execution
report_fields.relation_impact: declared relation impact and missing metadata

agent_safety_notes: AI Builder Agent may call publish readiness analysis.
AI Builder Agent may explain blockers and warnings.
AI Builder Agent must not treat readiness as actual publish.
AI Builder Agent must not execute publish, migrations, runtime writes, uninstall, rollback, or runtime deletion.
